title: What Scripture Actually Says About Self-Control (It's Not Willpower)
caption:
Most men treat self-control like a muscle. Build it up, flex it harder, push through.

Then they wonder why it breaks every single time the pressure gets heavy enough.

Galatians 5 doesn't list self-control as a muscle. It lists it as a fruit. The last one in the list. The evidence of a life that's growing in the right direction. You don't manufacture it — you cultivate the soil it grows in.

That changes what you're training for. Not willpower. Not white-knuckling. Connection to the vine. Walk with God, feed the Spirit, fill the gaps with something better than what you're cutting — and self-control starts to grow on its own.

That's not a shortcut. It's the right direction.

#faith #scripture #selfcontrol #christianmen #galatians5 #godlymen #manofgod #christianity #formation
theme: He runs his life. His impulses don't control him.
